publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-03-19 23:59:23 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Collection is currently being processed. Material must be requested 48 hours in advance.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Collection includes books, papers, correspondence, audio and video recordings, and other documentation related to the life and career of Danny Schechter.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Danny Schechter papers, #8530. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Danny Schechter (1942-2015), Cornell Class of 1964 and writer for the Cornell Daily Sun, was an activist, journalist, media critic, writer, and independent filmmaker. He played a significant role in the Cornell activist community in the 1960s and became a civil rights worker after graduation. He worked as a producer for CNN in its start-up phase, was responsible for more than 50 news segments on the ABC newsmagazine 20/20, for which he won two Emmy Awards, and was a leader in the South Africa Anti-Apartheid movement.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Files include newsclippings, correspondence, flyers, and papers written by Schechter.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes issues of Black and Red, Peacework, and 100 Flowers Review.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly issues of the Old Mole.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs and a 1980 issue of The Daily Free Press featuring Schechter.

did.unittitle: Bizarre Families of the World Bulletin
Culture and Politics by Stanley Aronowitz

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes newspapers on 1963 DC Civil Rights March and JFK assassination.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes promotional materials for "Plunder: the Crime of Our Time."

did.unittitle: Today in the Middle East no. 26
UCPD training: Punk Rock and Heavy Metal: The Problem/One Solution
Africa Research Group drafts and clippings
Africa South: The Magazine of Southern African Affairs
The American Committee on Africa. National Conference on Namibia and the US
Inqaba ya Basebenzi -- Journal of the Marxist Worker's Tendency of the African National Congress
Script for film (or report) about African market (and women), Liberia
Annual Thabo Mbeki Africa Day Lecture
Bishop Tutu Peace Concert (and why it was cancelled, etc.)
Danny and Little Steven write to ANC

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes note to Schechter from Mandela, as well as photographs, press passes, posters for "Prisoners of Hope" and "Countdown to Freedom".

did.unittitle: Mandela: the Authorized Portrait promotional shopping bag

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Mandela, memorial programs, and ticket to Mandela's visit to US Congress.

did.unittitle: Nkosi Johnson. AIDS symbol visit to NYC (photographs)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes articles written by Schechter and correspondence.

did.unittitle: South Africa. Types notes on Ruth Frist, etc.
Civil rights movement - Northern Student Movement
Students for a Democratic Society - Student Activists
Field Manual No. 19-15 Civil Disturbances and Disasters
Drug & Hospital News MLK Jr. memorial issue
Sojourn for Truth with Jesse Jackson script
Thr Black Panthers and Black Scholarship

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an issues of the Black Scholar and The Black Panther and Here and Now For Bobby Seale by Jean Genet.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Folder titles appear as Schechter labelled them and may include language that did not have negative connotations in at the time of creation, but may be considered offensive to contemporary audiences.

did.unittitle: CORE and SNNC (Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee)
Economic Research and Action Project (Students for a Democratic Society)
Housing demands of non-whites in urban areas
Black Circles, no. 1. For Boston Area Anarchists
Building a Militant Student Movement: Program of the National Student League
The Continuity of Domestic and International Imperalism Throughout American History -- Gareth Stedman Jones
Counter-Revolutionary Violence: Bloodbaths in Fact and Propaganda. Noam Chomsky and Edward S. Herman
Lives of Our Times...a Magazine to Correct the Record
The Port Huron Statement -- Student for a Democratic Society

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of 1989 reprint of pamphlet originally circulated in 1962.

did.unittitle: SDS Work-In Toward a Worker-Student Alliance
Sing Out! The Folk Song Magazine, vol. 25, no. 2
The Strategy of Revenge: the New Blitz Plan of the German General Staff by Ernst Henri
What You're Up Against: a People's Legal Defense Manual
Why We Strike (published by the Columbia Strike Committee)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly reports and newsletters published by NACLA (North American Congress on Latin America).

North American Congress on Latin America: info. packets

Afflict the Comfortable, Comfortable the Afflicted: a Guide for Campus Alternative Journalists

Communications and journalism -- conferences and awards

WGBH (Ten O'Clock News) and WLVI (Joe Oteri Show)

Five All Night Live All Night

(Danny Schechter and Associates) Company: incorporation papers/reports

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: For files on individual projects, see Series X, Films, docuseries, and book projects

Globalvision. "Rights and Wrongs". The Fight with PBS
Effort to confront public tv PBS

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Application materials for Voices on Congo project.

did.unittitle: Ginsberg, Czech correspondence (Globalvision Allen Ginsberg project)
RAW (Rights and Wrongs): press, one sheets, mailers
